2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="StartPage"> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:opsz,wght,FILL,GRAD@24,400,0,0" rel="stylesheet"> <div class="a_skipLinks"> <a class="item" href
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="a_dsSectionHeading" id=""> <div class="sectionHeadingContent"><img alt="Neste landskamper" class="sectionHeadingImage" src="/gfx/norway.svg">Neste landskamper</img></div> </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="20" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M504-480 320-664l56-56 240 240-240 240-56-56 184-184Z"></path> </svg>
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="cardTitle">Futsal for barn 6-12 år</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="p1">- Vi forsvarer oss godt i førsteomgangen</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="topMenu"> <a href="/turneringer/"> Finn kamper </a> <a href="/landslag/"> Landslag
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="a_tabulatedLineOld"> <button class="a_cleanButton tabulatedItem active" id="homeButtonId"> England </button> <button class="a_cleanButton tabulatedItem" id="awayButtonId"> No
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (38 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.google.com/httpservice/retry/enablejs" target="_blank">Les mer her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 4 times

id="ad"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Landslag - Norges Fotballforbund

https://www.fotball.no/landslag/

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)

Heading is empty

<h3 class="templateTitle"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

<svg height="20" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M504-480 320-664l56-56 240 240-240 240-56-56 184-184Z"></path> </svg>
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (76 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="StartPage"> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:opsz,wght,FILL,GRAD@24,400,0,0" rel="stylesheet"> <div class="a_skipLinks"> <a class="item" href
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="a_dsSectionHeading" id=""> <div class="sectionHeadingContent"><img alt="Neste landskamper" class="sectionHeadingImage" src="/gfx/norway.svg">Neste landskamper</img></div> </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><em>Konkurransen er avsluttet, vinnerne vil bli kontaktet av Norges Fotballforbund</em></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 2 times

id="ad"
Each ID must be unique on the page

https://www.fotball.no/tema/medieservice/

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="cardTitle">Mediehåndbok 2025</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="intro"></h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.google.com/httpservice/retry/enablejs" target="_blank">Les mer her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a alt="Hjem" class="crumb" href="/"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Home" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M240-200

MODERATE

<a aria-label="Mediehåndbok 2025" class="a_card dsCard" href="https://idrettsforbundet.sharepoint.com/:b:/s/NFFverktoykasse/IQAext_2QzlqQrOrNRhlV1PUAYZ8DgQFopf11UjAEE9fb7o" target="_blank"> <div class
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til arkivet'

<a aria-label="Gå til arkivet" class="sectionHeadingLink" href="/arkiv/?d=1&kw=" target="_self">Gå til arkivet</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Ring tlf 98702033</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.google.com/httpservice/retry/enablejs" target="_blank">Les mer her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="cardTitle">Landslagsskolens sportsplan</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi

MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (954 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.google.com/httpservice/retry/enablejs" target="_blank">Les mer her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="a_footerLink" href="https://strategi.fotball.no/" target="_blank"> <div class="a_icon xs white" data-icon="ChevronRight" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="20"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select id="clubId" name="clubId"><option value="">-- Alle klubber --</option> </select>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (10 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table data-colspan="7"> <thead> <tr> <th>Navn</th> <th>Godkjent</th> <th>Spilleklar</th> <th>Sakstype</th> <th>Fra klubb</th> <th>Til klubb</th> <th>Type</th> <th>Kategori</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody>
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Navn</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Godkjent</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<th>Spilleklar</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers

MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Sakstype</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers

MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Fra klubb</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Til klubb</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Type</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Kategori</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['legend', 'input', 'input']

<ul> <legend class="visuallyhidden">Finn Overganger:</legend> <li class="atomicOneQuarterWidth a_atomicInput"> <label for="districtId">Velg krets</label> <select id="districtId" name="districtId"><opt
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (33 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="templateTitle"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Denne appen er et must for alle som er interessert i norsk fotball.</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.google.com/httpservice/retry/enablejs" target="_blank">Les mer her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

https://www.fotball.no/lov-og-reglement/skjemaer-og-kontrakter/

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="cardTitle">Billettinformasjon A-kvinner</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.google.com/httpservice/retry/enablejs" target="_blank">Les mer her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 style="margin: 0">Menn</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="topMenu"> <a href="/turneringer/"> Finn kamper </a> <a href="/landslag/"> Landslag
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="a_tabulatedLine contentBlockWrapper stickyMobile"> <div class="tabulatedItemsWrapper"> <div class="tabulatedItemWrapper active"> <button class="a_cleanButton tabulatedItem small">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['legend']

<ul> <legend class="visuallyhidden">Finn turnering:</legend> <li class="atomicOneThirdWidth a_atomicInput"> <label for="s">Velg sesong</label> <select id="s" name="s"><option selected="selected" value
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.google.com/httpservice/retry/enablejs" target="_blank">Les mer her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 3 times

id="ad"
Each ID must be unique on the page

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="cardTitle">Pressekonferanse Klaveness og Løken 9. februar</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 2 times

id="ad"
Each ID must be unique on the page

2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="templateTitle"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

<a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mainHeaderLink" href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=
Add href attribute or use a button element

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://fotball.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://fotball.no --max-pages 21 --format html
